system.powerDescription:
Neurons, tendons, and veins. Your grace links the world around yourself within an up to CAT area. When you activate this power choose one of the following effects to take hold within the area: 

• All exorcists within may use your psyche bursts freely. 
• Your powers with a range of adjacent or longer may originate from any point you can see in the area. 
• Creatures may broadcast their thoughts to ALL other creatures within the area. 
• You know whenever a creature enters or exits the area as well as if it is a sin, drifter, human or exorcist.
